items.title: Here's a common trap with AI if you're not careful: 1.
items.title_zh: 如果你不小心的话，下面是人工智能的一个常见陷阱： 1.
items.description: Here's a common trap with AI if you're not careful: 1. You ask it to generate some markdown files (maybe to build some skills). You skim them and they look ok. Sure, there's a bit of slop in there, but you're too lazy to edit them manually…
items.description_zh: 如果你不小心的话，下面是 AI 的一个常见陷阱： 1. 你要求它生成一些 Markdown 文件（也许是为了培养一些技能）。你浏览一下它们，它们看起来还不错。当然，其中有一些废话，但你懒得手动编辑它们......

items.title: With agents generating md and html files anyone else find themselves too lazy to edit the…
items.title_zh: 通过代理生成 md 和 html 文件，其他人发现自己懒得编辑......
items.description: With agents generating md and html files anyone else find themselves too lazy to edit the files manually? All the agent generated files seem good but then always have at least 10% slop in there.
items.description_zh: 使用生成 md 和 html 文件的代理，还有其他人发现自己懒得手动编辑文件吗？所有代理生成的文件看起来都不错，但总是有至少 10% 的溢出。

items.description_zh: GBrain v0.31.1 刚刚提供了真正的 MCP 瘦客户端支持。所以基本上你可以运行一台“家庭 GBrain 服务器”，其他所有东西都可以通过 MCP 连接到它，它的工作方式非常接近本地运行。 GBrain 刚刚去…

items.title: Every founder I meet: man, the bar is so low to be a good VC.
items.title_zh: 我遇到的每一位创始人都会说：伙计，成为一名优秀风险投资家的门槛太低了。
items.description: Every founder I meet: man, the bar is so low to be a good VC. Just do what you say, and you’re already top decile. Every VC I meet: dude, the bar is so low to be a good VC. Just do what you say, and you’re already top decile. Something has…

items.title: If you are always annoyed at models estimating work as if a human is doing it instead of…
items.title_zh: 如果你总是对模型估计工作感到恼火，就好像人类正在做而不是......
items.description: If you are always annoyed at models estimating work as if a human is doing it instead of just crushing the work, add this to your custom instructions.. “When estimating or planning, assume you (the model) are executing the work yourself. R…
items.description_zh: 如果您总是对模型估计工作感到恼火，就好像人类在做而不是仅仅压垮工作一样，请将其添加到您的自定义说明中。“在估计或计划时，假设您（模型）正在自己执行工作。R……
